title: La dame aux camélias
actors: Yvonne Printemps, Pierre Fresnay, Jane Marken
plot: Marguerite Gautier is a courtesan in Paris. She falls deeply in love with a young man of promise, Armand Duval. When Armand's father begs her not to ruin his hopes of a career and position by marrying Armand, she acquiesces and le...
